apps.title: All Agents
apps.subtitle: Explore our powerful AI tools. Pick one and start creating.
prompt.default.1: Describe what you want to create...
suggestion.act1: Create a fun ice breaker activity to get students introduced to each other.
suggestion.act2: Design a quick 5-minute energizer activity to wake up the classroom.
suggestion.act3: Generate a short interactive poll or quiz to gauge student understanding.
suggestion.act4: Develop an educational game related to the core topic.
suggestion.act5: Provide a set of clear, actionable tasks for students to complete independently.
suggestion.act6: Design a roleplay scenario where students act out a real-world situation.
suggestion.act7: Outline a hands-on experiment that students can perform to test the theory.
suggestion.act8: Create guided discussion questions for small groups to debate.
suggestion.act9: Draft a creative writing exercise to help students reflect on the topic.
suggestion.act10: Formulate a complex problem-solving task for students to solve.
suggestion.act11: Write a detailed real-world case study for students to analyze.
suggestion.act12: Design a collaborative project where students work together over a week.
suggestion.act13: Outline an individual research project for students to complete.
suggestion.act14: Set up a task for students to create and deliver a group presentation.
suggestion.act15: Provide guidelines for an individual student presentation.
suggestion.act16: Create a peer review rubric and activity for students to evaluate each other.
suggestion.def1: Create an explainer video about DNA
suggestion.def2: Write a YouTube script for learning Python
suggestion.def3: Build an assessment quiz for Physics
suggestion.ex2: How does a combustion engine work?
suggestion.sc1: Write a YouTube script for learning Python
suggestion.sc2: Draft a podcast script about history
suggestion.sc3: Create a short script for a commercial
suggestion.ts1: Build an assessment quiz for Physics
suggestion.ts2: Create a math test for 5th grade
suggestion.ts3: Generate multiple choice questions on biology
suggestion.vc1: Create an explainer video about DNA
suggestion.vc3: Convert my script into a video lesson
suggestion.fc1: Create a full course on Digital Marketing
suggestion.vcrs1: Create a video course on personal finance
suggestion.vcrs2: Design a video tutorial series for Excel
suggestion.vcrs3: Develop a video masterclass on photography
suggestion.lk1: Generate a learning kit for Spanish basics
suggestion.lk2: Create a study guide for world geography
suggestion.lk3: Compile a resource kit for learning guitar
